name: Ascend Factory
short_description: Welcome to Ascend Factory, a factory simulation game that challenges your ingenuity and resource management skills. Immerse yourself in a world of automation and strategic planning as you progress through levels of increasing complexity!
detailed_description:
Ascend Factory is a factory simulation game that challenges your ingenuity and resource management skills. Dive into a world of automation and strategic planning as you build an ever-more efficient factory, floor by floor!

🚀 First Version Available!

The first version of Ascend Factory is now playable! The game is still in development, and the 1.0 release will bring many additions and improvements. Regular updates are planned to expand content and fix potential bugs.

Build Your factory

Construct a factory using essential components:

  • Conveyors: Efficiently transport resources throughout your factory.

  • Splitters: Divide by separating resource flows.

  • Mergers: Combine resources logically on a Conveyor.

  • Assemblers: Create new complex products.

  • Foundries: Transform raw materials into usable resources.

  • Elevators: Transport resources betweens layers!

Progress Through Layers

Discover new challenges at each layer. Complete levels by meeting specific resource requirements to unlock the next layer. Develop strategies and optimize your factory layout to solve increasingly complex puzzles.

Elevate Your Gameplay

Master the use of the Elevator, your main block for vertically moving resources and transporting objects between different layers.

Progression and Unlockables

Advance in the game by meeting resource requirements and unlocking new layers. Discover new challenges at each stage as you progress through Ascend Factory!

A Future Under Construction

Development is ongoing, with new content updates and bug fixes on the way. Your feedback is crucial in shaping the ultimate Ascend Factory experience!

Are you ready to build the ultimate automated tower?
